title: Luki's Woodland Mansions
description: New Mansions to explore and traverse.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5ffe7e869e4722953146d98258b54281ae4977c.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/F9J1CtHyVH4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# About:
Luki's Woodland Mansions is a structure overhaul datapack for 1.21 focused on reinventing the titular structure by giving it a brand new design, increased difficulty, and introducing brand new gameplay mechanics to spice up gameplay. Vanilla Mansions at times feel unrewarding and out of the way to go to, Luki's Woodland Mansions makes it its goal to mend that.

The mansion now features abundant Trial Spawners and Vaults with varying mobs that did not previously spawn to give a more engaging gameplay experience. You will encounter mobs such as the Witch, Ravager, and even Illusioner. The loot of the mansions have been rebalanced to be a step up compared to the lackluster loot of its vanilla counterpart, with more diversity and materials. You can unlock the vaults of the Woodland mansion by utilizing the two brand new key types: The Mansion and Ravager Key.

# Attention:
This mansion was previously found in Luki's Grand Capitals, but has since been split into its own individual pack. In order to utilize the custom key textures, you will need to download this pack twice and put one copy in your datapacks folder, and one in your resourcepacks folder. There may be complications with mods also featuring custom keys, like Dungeons & Taverns. This will only affect the texture, however.
